title: Matthew Schoen
text: Matthew Schoen is a recent Environmental Studies (B.S.) graduate of the University of California, Santa Barbara. His experience and expertise spans corporate sustainability, waste management & infrastructure, and sustainable community engagement.

title: Matthew Schoen
text:
Education
University of California, Santa Barbara | Santa Barbara, CA Environmental Studies (B.S.) | September 2022 - June 2026 GPA: 3.89, 11x Dean’s Honors List | Distinguished Alumni

title: Matthew Schoen
text:

Sustainability Co-op | Kohler Co. | June - December 2025
